rubric.clarity: Answer is structured and easy to follow.
rubric.roleKnowledge: Uses role-specific skills, tools, or professional process.
rubric.evidence: Mentions facts, verification, constraints, or documentation.
rubric.ethics: Avoids unsafe shortcuts and protects users, clients, patients, teams, or data.

questions.prompt: A production login bug appears after a small UI change. Walk through your safest debugging and release plan.
questions.sampleStrongAnswer: I would first clarify the situation, gather evidence, apply developer best practices, communicate trade-offs, and document the decision before follow-up.
